title: EnderVaults
description: Expandable Ender Chests with GUI management
body:
EnderVault is a powerful Minecraft plugin developed by Xreatlabs that enhances the traditional Ender Chest system. It allows players to unlock and manage multiple Ender Chests through a sleek GUI, offering a seamless and secure storage solution. Players can use commands like /echest list to view, buy, and access extra vaults using in-game currency or premium coins. The plugin is fully configurable, placeholder-ready, and compatible with Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, and Purpur servers.

✨ Key Features

Expandable Vaults: Players can unlock up to 9 additional vaults (configurable) using in-game money or premium coins.

Dual Currency System: Supports purchasing vaults with in-game money (Vault) or premium coins (PlayerPoints/Custom).

GUI Interface: A visual menu to view and manage unlocked vaults.

Fully Configurable: Customizable vault sizes, permissions, and storage types.

Placeholder Support: Integrate placeholders for dynamic content.

Multi-Platform Compatibility: Works with Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, and Purpur servers.

🛠️ Commands

/echest list: Opens the vault selection menu.

/echest <vault_number>: Access a specific Ender Vault.

/echest buy <vault_number>: Purchase an additional vault.

/echest set <player> <vault_number>: Assign a specific vault to a player.

🔐 Permissions

endervault.use: Allows a player to use their Ender Vault.

endervault.viewothers: Allows a player to view others' Ender Vaults.

endervault.buy: Allows a player to purchase additional vaults.

endervault.set: Allows an admin to assign vaults to players.

⚙️ Configuration Example
storage:
  type: "mysql" # Options: pdc, sqlite, mysql
  mysql:
    url: "jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/database"
    username: "user"
    password: "password"

config:
  OnlineMode: true
  maxVaults: 10
